name: QGIS
description: QGIS is a useful mapping surface inside Agriculture & Food Systems.
whyUseIt: People in Agriculture & Food Systems use QGIS to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using QGIS as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from QGIS.
